title: Product Explorer Filter Configuration
description: Defines which filter columns are visible per category and their display options. Maps to the WP inline productFinderFilters JS config.

fields.label: Filter Name
fields.description: Internal identifier for this filter (matches product field names)

fields.label: Display Label
fields.description: Column header text shown in the explorer UI

fields.label: Filter Type
fields.description: UI control type for this filter

fields.label: Filter Options
fields.description: Predefined option values for this filter (for multi-select and single-select types). Leave empty for boolean filters.

fields.label: Sort Order
fields.description: Display order of this filter column (lower = leftmost)
